title: Create: Belgian Voxel Trains
description: Adds Belgian trains in voxel to play with the Create mod
body:
# **⚫️🟡🔴 🚂 Create: Belgian voxel trains 🚂 ⚫️🟡🔴**

![Trains <3](https://sim-studio.net/SimNoTrains/2022-08-21_20.34.29%202.png)
![Train again <3](https://sim-studio.net/SimNoTrains/2022-08-21_20.39.06%202.png)

**<center>🚧 WARNING: This pack is under development! 🚧</center>**

**Pack/Addon "Create: Belgian Voxel Trains" made by SimNoLuc**



Creation of Belgian locomotives and cars for the SNCB/NMBS networks. The models are chosen according to my favorite and my desire. The trains come from my IR mod available here, playable with the IR mod. If you would like to see other models or contribute to the project, contact me! You can also support me by making a donation via Paypal to the following address: contact@sim-studio.be



🔘 You can see my other mods "[[IR] Belgian voxel trains pack](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/immersive-railroading-belgian-voxel-trains-pack)" and "[Belgian Signal & Catenary - Voxel Pack](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/belgian-signal-catenary-voxel-pack)" which adds trains for the Immersive Railroading mod and lots of signals and catenaries typical of Belgium!

![Gif of my trains](https://sim-studio.net/SimNoTrains/Video-BG-Longueur-Train.gif)

Current version: V1.3.1

Last update: 08/06/2024 (DD-MM-YYYY)
